channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Understanding the Legal and Moral Implications of 'No Quarter' in Warfare
item.description: The phrase 'no quarter' has become a point of concern following statements by United States Defence Secretary Pete Hegseth, who said the U.S. would continue military operations against Iran with 'no q...

item.title: Flooded Roads and Burglaries Disrupt Limpopo Schools
item.description: The Limpopo Department of Education has temporarily suspended schooling for two days in several districts hit hard by continuous heavy rains and the risk of flash floods. Vhembe and Mopani districts r...

item.title: Senegal Faces Critical Debt Challenges Amid Calls for Restructuring
item.description: Senegal is going through a serious debt problem, wit debt at 132% of GDP as of end 2024, and paying debt is consuming a bigger chunk of government revenue. Prime Minister Ousmane Sonko say no to debt ...

item.title: Guzman y Gomez co-CEO reduces workload as he prepares for kidney transplant
item.description: Hilton Brett, co-chief executive of Guzman y Gomez, will be scaling back his day-to-day responsibilities as he prepares for a kidney transplant later this year. The company has assured investors that ...

item.title: Dolly Parton Discusses Her Health and Grieving Process at Dollywood’s 41st Season Opening
item.description: Country music legend Dolly Parton made a heartfelt public return on March 13, 2026, at the grand opening of Dollywood’s 41st season. Speaking to an enthusiastic crowd, the 80-year-old artist reflected...

item.title: Highlights from the 2026 Oscars Red Carpet and Affordable Style Tips
item.description: The 2026 Oscars delivered memorable moments not only on stage but also on the red carpet, showcasing celebrity fashion at its finest. Emma Stone dazzled in a silver-beaded Louis Vuitton gown complemen...

item.title: Political Messages Take Centre Stage at the 2026 Oscars
item.description: The 98th Academy Awards in Los Angeles were marked by an unusually political tone, with films addressing social issues dominating the night. Paul Thomas Anderson’s 'One Battle After Another' led the w...

item.title: Zelensky Urges Trilateral Peace Talks and Regulates Drone Exports Amid Ongoing Conflict
item.description: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky has expressed readiness for the next round of trilateral peace talks with the United States and Russia, but progress is stalled as Moscow has refused to send a d...

item.title: Climate Change Hits East Africa Unevenly: Drought in Somalia, Floods in Kenya
item.description: In East Africa, neighbouring countries are experiencing very different extremes due to climate change. In Somalia, prolonged drought has left pastoralists struggling to keep their livestock alive. Ash...

item.title: Federal Government Assesses Needs at Federal Polytechnic of Oil and Gas, Bonny

item.description: JJ Gabriel, popularly called 'Kid Messi', is a highly talented 15-year-old striker in Manchester United's academy who has impressed everyone with his performances for the U-18 side, scoring 20 goals i...

item.title: ABS-CBN resumes Global Hoops Showcase for its third season
item.description: ABS-CBN announces the return of the Global Hoops Showcase for its third year, continuing its commitment to providing a platform for basketball talents, especially Fil-foreign players. The annual event...

item.title: Antony Catalano faces assault charges amid history of aggressive behaviour
item.description: Antony Catalano, a prominent Melbourne businessman and media owner, has been charged with assaulting his wife, Stefanie, in a violent incident that allegedly involved dragging her through their apartm...

item.title: Chery introduces more affordable Tiggo Cross LiT with standard features
item.description: Chery has launched a new entry-level version of its Tiggo Cross SUV, called the LiT, aimed at buyers looking for value without compromising on essentials. The LiT sits below the turbocharged Million E...

item.title: Parliament Committee Appreciates TSN Printing Plant Development and Future Benefits

item.title: Instagram to discontinue end-to-end encryption for messages from May 8, 2026
item.description: Meta has officially announced that Instagram will cease supporting end-to-end (E2E) encrypted messaging from 8 May 2026. Users who rely on this feature for secure communications will need to consider ...

item.title: SANDF deployed to tackle crime hotspots in Gauteng and other provinces
item.description: The Chief of the South African National Defence Force (SANDF), General Rhudzani Maphwanya, has confirmed that over 2,000 soldiers are being deployed across Gauteng, North West, the Western Cape, and F...

item.title: Rajya Sabha Biennial Elections 2026: Voting Commences in Bihar as NDA and Opposition Contest Remaining Seats
item.description: The biennial Rajya Sabha elections of 2026 are underway to fill 37 seats across ten states in India, including Maharashtra, Odisha, Tamil Nadu, West Bengal, Assam, Bihar, Chhattisgarh, Haryana, Himach...

item.title: Practical Tips for Saving on Groceries Amid Rising Gas Prices
item.description: With the continuous increase in gas prices in the Philippines, household budgets are being stretched, prompting many Filipinos to look for practical ways to save money. One effective area to manage ex...

item.title: Tinubu brokers historic settlement for OPL 245, unlocking 150,000 barrels per day
item.description: Finally, Nigeria don see end for the long-standing OPL 245 wahala wey don dey for over 15 years. President Bola Tinubu don announce say the Federal Government don reach agreement with Italian oil firm...
